name_cn:
Vintage Pink in Stock!!️
Original factory fleece lining ✔️Classic Lady Dior, a must-have 3-grid small bag for everyone 😍. Charming, elegant, and full of presence 💃🏻. Can be worn crossbody or carried by hand, full of feminine charm. A beauty bag that many fashion icons and on Instagram have, don't miss it ❤️
size:17cm
